name: Fire Domain
description: Fire Domain is an Athasian elemental domain for the Elemental Cleric. At 3rd level it grants always-prepared domain spells, a domain-specific Elemental Channeling option, and a 3rd-level feature. It also grants a 6th-level enhancement and a 17th-level capstone.

effects.name: Fire Domain Training
effects.description: Fire Domain features apply according to subclass progression.
